trivia_bullets.text: Skeleton Archer debuted in Core Set 2019 (2018) and has 7 total prints through Foundations (2024). Randy Vargas illustrated all 7 — an unusual single-artist consistency for a reprinted common across Core Sets, The List, Double Masters 2022, and Arena Beginner Set.

Randy Vargas is a Venezuelan-born artist who began MTG work with Tetsuko Umezawa, Fugitive (Dominaria, 2018). His oil painting for Marit Lage's Slumber (Modern Horizons) sold for $4,400 at auction — noted at the time as only his second traditional painting for the game.

Skeleton Archer is a 3/3 for {3}{B} that deals 1 damage to any target on entry — a pauper-legal removal-ping on a body. EDHREC records it in approximately 21,013 Commander decks. The ping can target players, creatures, or planeswalkers, giving it flexibility beyond pure removal.

"Soul, flesh, even eyes — none of these are strictly necessary for deadly precision." — Modriss of Zargoth Fen. Modriss is a necromancer character quoted across Core Set 2020/2021 cards. Zargoth Fen is a location introduced in M20 flavor text; vorthosjay (MTG lore authority) has noted it is a new location not assumed to be on any previously named plane.
